title: Backend Developer: REST API & Database Platform (Gaming Intelligence SaaS)
description_excerpt: Featured Posted 5 hours ago Backend Developer: REST API & Database Platform (Gaming Intelligence SaaS) Job Feedback Save Job Verified Payment verified Rating is 5.0 out of 5. 5.0 $200K+ spent Location United States Hourly: $15.00 - $80.00 Intermediate Est. time: More than 6 months, 30+ hrs/week About the Project We are building a proprietary data platform for our company - a mobile gaming intelligence company. We already have active enterprise customers, but we're looking to revamp our product and deliver more value to our existing customers. Our platform tracks feature releases, content drops, events, and live-ops activity across hundreds of mobile games, including metadata, images, and videos. Currently, this data is managed through a third-party tool. We are bringing the system in-house and need to build the backend foundation for the platform. The system can include: - A PostgreSQL database for structured release data - A REST API that clients can use to query the data - Cloudflare R2 or AWS S3 integration for image/video asset storage - Signed URL generation for secure asset delivery - API key authentication - Tiered client access levels based on subscription plan - CSV/data ingestion - Internal admin functionality for managing releases and API keys The data structure is already well-defined. We have existing CSVs and a working third-party API that we currently use, so the schema is not being designed from scratch.
